rationale: Fresh validator inspected TASK-074 implementation builds, session-handoff implementation, schemas, smoke tests, scripts, docs, skills, and current roadmap task text. Required checks passed and the session handoff feature appears implemented: tool-context new-session handoffs spawn a fresh pi process, command-context handoffs still use ctx.newSession, context-reset/external modes are explicit, and tests cover payload staging/status/transcript plus command replacement behavior. Closure is blocked because git status is dirty/uncommitted, so task-close isolation cannot record clean=true. Full TASK-074 closure is also not decidable from the supplied session-handoff builds because current roadmap TASK-074 now includes claim wait-queue acceptance/verification not covered by those builds and tests/smoke/claim-wait-queue.test.mjs is absent. Isolation policy blocks task-close validation until clean=true are recorded.
checks: npm run typecheck && npm run test:features && npm run test:smoke && npm run check:architecture && npm run test:pack (pass)

issues.summary: Task-close policy requires a clean worktree, but git status shows modified and untracked files including TASK-074 implementation/build artifacts and unrelated TASK-075/control-room files.

Current TASK-074 roadmap acceptance includes claim wait-queue requirements and verification for tests/smoke/claim-wait-queue.test.mjs, but the supplied implementation builds target session handoff/isolation and that test file is absent.
Missing required validation isolation evidence: clean=true.

blocking_questions: Commit, stash, or otherwise isolate all uncommitted changes, then rerun task-close validation from a clean worktree and checked SHA.
Either split the claim wait-queue refinement out of TASK-074 or provide implementation/test evidence for the current TASK-074 wait-queue acceptance before task closure.
Run this gateway from fresh validator context or clean worktree and record a checked SHA.

isolation_requirement.reason: This gateway profile requires validation independent from builder context.

isolation.notes: Fresh validator prompt used; closure blocked because worktree dirty/uncommitted before validation report write.
